final:
// // This comment suggests the watchdog timer will only reset the system when the heartbeat signal is received, but in reality, it resets the system when the heartbeat signal is not received.
module watchdog_timer (
    input wire clk,           // Clock input
    input wire rst_n,         // Active low reset
    input wire enable,        // Enable to start the timer
    input wire heartbeat,     // Heartbeat signal
    input wire [3:0] timeout, // Configurable timeout value
    output reg reset         // Reset signal output
);
    reg [3:0] counter;       // Counter to track time
    
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            counter <= 0;
            reset <= 0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            if (heartbeat) begin
                counter <= 0; // Reset counter on heartbeat
                reset <= 0;   // Keep reset low
            end else if (counter >= timeout) begin
                reset <= 1;   // Assert reset if timeout is reached
            end else begin
                counter <= counter + 1; // Increment counter
            end
        end else begin
            reset <= 0; // If not enabled, keep reset low
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests the watchdog timer will only reset the system when the heartbeat signal is received, but in reality, it resets the system when the heartbeat signal is not received.
